modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Students can't see each other's Panopto videos in D2L.

full_description_text: I want my students to see other students' videos in Panopto. But they can't access them from D2L. I need help figuring out how to allow this. It's important for my class.

description: I want my students to see other students' videos in Panopto. But they can't access them from D2L. I need help figuring out how to allow this. It's important for my class.
